name: Contact Birthday Greeting
description: Creates a task to send a birthday greeting to contacts with a recorded birthday. Strengthens personal relationships.
descriptionAr: ينشئ مهمة لإرسال تهنئة عيد ميلاد للعملاء المسجل تاريخ ميلادهم. يعزز العلاقات الشخصية.

config.title: Send birthday greeting to {{name}}
config.description: Today is {{name}}'s birthday. Send a personalized greeting to maintain the relationship.
